changes.author: @Nicolai-
changes.description: First blueprint version with support for EnOcean PTM 215Z (Friends Of Hue).

changes.author: @pdfowler
changes.description: [Feature] Added support for PTM 215Z chord actions, including top and bottom simultaneous button presses.

changes.author: @pdfowler
changes.description: [Fix] Store per-button press timestamps so rapid sequential presses do not overwrite each other before release handling.

changes.author: @pdfowler
changes.description: [Fix] Ignore malformed helper keys and only persist valid press timestamps.
